decline_serviceplan_message: Decline and delete this service plan?
serviceplan_shifts_hint: Tip: Select a shift, then assign a service.
serviceplan_group_start_hint: Tip: Set the start date for each group.
serviceplan_plan_hint: Tip: Name the plan and choose its visibility.
settings_join_hint: Tip: Join an existing service plan.
settings_create_hint: Tip: Create a new service plan.
settings_edit_hint: Tip: Edit your active service plan.
main_inspection_info_1: The next main inspection (HU) can be read from the HU sticker on the rear license plate.
main_inspection_info_2: At the top edge ? at 12 o'clock ? is the month when the HU is due. A black marker to the left and right of the 12 helps readability from a distance.
main_inspection_info_3: The number in the center shows the year in which the HU is due. The year can also be identified by the color of the HU sticker.
main_inspection_fine_329113_text: HU overdue by more than 2 months up to 4 months
main_inspection_fine_329119_text: HU overdue by more than 4 months up to 8 months
main_inspection_fine_329610_text: HU overdue by more than 8 months.
